subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and that the Ancient Beauty Who hath come in the name of 'Alí is verily the Truth from Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و ان جمال القدم الذی جاء باسم علی لحق من الحق علی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @station of the Manifestation of God
